seoTitle: Surfers Paradise vs Susan River — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Surfers Paradise and Susan River. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Surfers Paradise vs Susan River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Surfers Paradise and Susan River.
heading: Surfers Paradise vs Susan River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Surfers Paradise, Queensland and Susan River, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Surfers Paradise has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Susan River (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Surfers Paradise or Susan River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Surfers Paradise has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Susan River scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Surfers Paradise scores 55/100 for bushfire risk. Susan River scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Surfers Paradise or Susan River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Surfers Paradise has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
